payload.answer: This conflicts with the existing fact that Sara is your daughter. “Daughter” and “niece” are incompatible roles for the same person relative to you, so the new input should be flagged for clarification rather than overwriting the existing memory.

entity_resolution.reason: Sara is already recorded as my daughter; the new statement assigns a different, incompatible relative role (niece). Without additional context, the system cannot reconcile whether it is the same Sara/person or a different relationship.

details: Added the new candidate fact with low confidence and marked as conflicting.

repair_options: Clarify whether “Sara” refers to the same person as in the existing memory.
Confirm which relationship is correct: daughter or niece.
Add context (e.g., step/half relation, adoption, or a specific family line) that could make one of the roles applicable.
